title: DistributedLock
description: Configuration and state for an Apache Curator InterProcessMutex distributed lock.

path.description: ZooKeeper path used as the lock node.

acquired.description: Whether the lock is currently acquired by this process.

threadCount.description: Number of times the current thread holds the lock (reentrant count).

lockPath.description: Actual ZooKeeper ephemeral node path created for this lock acquisition.
